parameters.allowed: OperatorPublishingStrategy object with ingress, apiserver fields
parameters.default: External for both ingress and apiserver
parameters.description: Controls visibility of DNS resources for ingress controller and API server (Azure-specific). Only valid when publish mode is 'Mixed'. Use to configure split-horizon DNS where API server and ingress have different visibility (internal vs external). Defaults to External (public) for both.

citations.docTitle: OpenShift Installer 4.20 Source Code

parameters.description: Visibility of Kubernetes API server load balancers (Azure-specific). External (default) = API accessible from internet (with authentication). Internal = API only accessible from within VNet. Use Internal for fully private clusters. Only valid with publish: Mixed.

citations.docTitle: OpenShift Installer 4.20 Source Code

parameters.description: Visibility of ingress controller DNS resources and load balancers (Azure-specific). External (default) = publicly accessible ingress. Internal = private ingress, only accessible from within VNet. Only valid with publish: Mixed.

citations.docTitle: OpenShift Installer 4.20 Source Code
